passiveAbilities.name: Herd Master
passiveAbilities.description: This character gains +1 energy during the Replenish Step for each friendly Murder Bunny in play.

passiveAbilities.name: Shepherd's Crook
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Slicing or Piercing Melee Dmg, reduce the Dmg dealt to W. If this character deals Impact Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

arcaneAbilities.name: Summon a Murder Bunny
arcaneAbilities.description:
Place a new friendly Murder Bunny in base contact with this character.
Catastrophe: This character suffers 3 Wds.

arcaneAbilities.name: Summon the Jackalope
arcaneAbilities.description:
This character suffers 3 Wds. Place a new Jackalope in base contact. It has no energy but is considered a permanent additional character in your troupe and may activate this turn.
Catastrophe: This character suffers 3 Wds. Place a new friendly Murder Bunny in base contact.

signatureMove.name: Rabbit Punch
signatureMove.endStepEffect: This attack deals +1 Dmg for each Animal within 4".
